galleryNote: Newest: the W wave (Workspaces / view-state persistence / eager boot) earned a VERIFIED 11-beat consolidated walkthrough (durable copy docs/autothing/evidence/workspaces-wave-walkthrough.mp4) covering all four W slices. Prior verified videos: S1b settings, Quarters-CRUD consolidated, Q2. Per-surface screenshots committed under docs/autothing/evidence/.

slices.title: Stable view-instance IDs + derived view capability kind
Generic view-state store keyed (fitting, instanceId) + terminal cwd/scrollback proof
Run-panel per-view-type toggles + server-start eager boot
Workspaces Fitting — tiling resizable panes over referenced view instances
Full 82-key settings.json coverage: schema-synced catalog + typed editors + searchable group layout
Global install/ownership backend + lockfile + skills→~/.claude/skills + adopt
Hook fittings via shared owner-scoped writer; delete dead claude-hooks.ts; migrate session-view
slices.videoNote: Backend slice; its observable surface (hooks read-only-with-provenance) is the /settings view filmed in settings-flow.webm.

slices.title: Seed importer — scan ~/.claude → emit fittings (+--adopt)
slices.videoNote: CLI slice; behavioral proof is an emitted fitting passing tsx scripts/validate-fitting.ts (Overall: PASS).
slices.blockerSummary: RESOLVED by Q3-hook-emission — hook-fitting emission is now implemented + validated (was reported-only).

slices.title: RC5 docs sync — canonical docs reflect the Quarters pivot (6 roles, shrunk kinds, folded Operative)
slices.videoNote: Docs slice; the re-runnable gate is the code-derived tests/docs-consistency.test.ts (7 passed).

slices.title: UI6/UI7 — Logs + Sessions read-only tailing over the real ~/.claude
S5 follow-up — importer/resolver emit installable hook fittings
slices.videoNote: CLI/backend slice; the re-runnable gate is tests/hook-fitting-emission.test.ts (5 passed, incl. validate-fitting + resolve→install round-trip).

slices.title: EA2 follow-ups — writeFileAtomic 0600 mode preservation + plugins classification
slices.videoNote: Backend + small read-only UI delta (Plugins panel) reusing the existing PrimitiveListPanel idiom; design-checked via screenshot. The re-runnable gate is tests/ea2-followups.test.ts (7 passed).

slices.title: MCP CRUD — add/edit/remove servers in mcp.json + reusable CRUD shell
Skills CRUD — create/edit/delete SKILL.md with owned-delete→Park guard
Scripts CRUD — commands + rules create/edit/delete reusing the file writer
slices.videoNote: Scripts share C2's FilePrimitiveForm mechanism (the video films the skill-create variant); C3's own re-runnable e2e (command create→edit→delete + both surfaces listed) is the per-slice gate.

slices.title: Hooks CRUD — hand-authored editable, fitting-owned read-only-with-provenance

globalGate.summary: All four W slices passed every gate (tests/e2e/typecheck/lint/build exit 0, design audit clean, consolidated walkthrough VERIFIED). Blockers are inherited/minor, none from this wave's acceptance criteria. Post-gate fix 0b29aeb: eager views survive the runner and boot with the operative.
blockers: Historical per-slice video coverage: S1/S2/S4 (flow-videos, not walkthrough-verified), S3/S5/Q1/Q3/Q4/C1-C5 (no per-slice video) — pre-existing, unchanged by this wave

RESOLVED 2026-06-10 (commit 0b29aeb): the unattributed SIGTERM was the runner's startup orphan sweep reaping eager-booted fittings; eager-toggled fittings are now server-lifecycle (sweep + down skip them, up also eager-boots). The hardcoded own-port status dir is also fixed (garrisonDir()-aware).
Parameterized embedded views (documents:read /:id) show their own empty state when tiled at the default instance — picker offers them regardless (v1)
Detach-reaped terminal sessions vanish from /sessions until next server boot rehydrates them (v1, logged in W2 notes)
